data.title: Hong Kong Insurance Sector Embraces AI and Blockchain for Transformation
data.description: According to PANews, Hong Kong's Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Christopher Hui, announced on social media that local insurance companies are set to integrate advanced technologies such as AI, big data, and blockchain to drive industry transformation. AXA, a leading insurance company, has already relocated its registration back to Hong Kong as part of this initiative.

data.title: Whales Acquire 50 Million XRP in Recent Transactions
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain analyst Ali (@ali_charts) revealed on the X platform that whales have purchased approximately 50 million XRP over the past 48 hours.

data.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Tops Fortune's 2025 Influential Business Leaders List
data.description: According to PANews, on August 5, Fortune magazine released its 2025 list of the world's 100 most influential business figures. Nvidia's founder and CEO, Jensen Huang, claimed the top spot for the first time, surpassing last year's leader, Tesla founder Elon Musk. Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella, Meta founder Mark Zuckerberg, and Musk ranked second to fourth, respectively. Google CEO Sundar Pichai, OpenAI founder Sam Altman, JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, and General Motors CEO Mary Barra were placed sixth, eighth, ninth, and tenth, respectively.

data.title: Circle Reports Increase in USDC Circulation Amid Recent Issuance and Redemption Activity
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 49 billion USDC and redeemed around 42 billion USDC over the seven days leading up to August 7, 2025. This activity resulted in an increase of about 8 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 64.6 billion, supported by reserves totaling approximately $64.7 billion. These reserves include around $9 billion in cash and $55.8 billion held in the Circle Reserve Fund.

data.title: XRP price prediction: This indicator hints at 640% rally
data.description:
With XRP flying high as investors react to the resolution of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) case, on-chain data suggests that more upside for the asset might be on the horizon. This projected rally is rooted in the fact that XRP’s Market Value to Realized Value (MVRV) ratio has formed a golden cross, a technical pattern that occurs when the short-term MVRV ratio moves above its long-term 200-day moving average (MA). XRP MVRV chart. Source: Santiment This rare event has occurred only twice in recent years, and both times it preceded major rallies, as observed by cryptocurrency trading analyst Ali Martinez in an X post on August 8
source: https://finbold.com/xrp-price-prediction-this-indicator-hints-at-640-rally/

data.title: Increase in Ethereum Buyers Signals New Market Demand
data.description: According to PANews, Glassnode's recent analysis indicates a significant rise in the number of first-time Ethereum buyers and momentum traders over the past few days. This trend suggests that new demand is entering the market, while existing holders are willing to increase their cost basis and re-engage with Ethereum.

data.title: Bitcoin Spot ETH Sees $253.2 Million Net Inflow in the U.S.
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Farside Investors reported a net inflow of $253.2 million into U.S. Bitcoin spot ETH this week. The breakdown of the inflows and outflows is as follows:

BlackRock's IBIT saw an inflow of $188.9 million, while Fidelity's FBTC experienced an outflow of $55.2 million. Bitwise's BITB recorded an outflow of $62.3 million, and ARK's ARKB had an outflow of $5.8 million.

Franklin's EZBC reported an inflow of $3.4 million, VanEck's HODL saw an inflow of $25.6 million, Grayscale's GBTC had an inflow of $3.4 million, and Grayscale Mini BTC recorded an inflow of $30.6 million.
